creator: zeus@gnu.org.ua
text:
graphics/drm-kmod-g20190710 doesn't recognize HDMI head on RV730 XT Radeon HD 4670 (xrandr reports HDMI as disconnected)

while graphics/drm-legacy-kmod-g20191217 works fine

> uname -a
12.1-RELEASE-p1

> pciconf -lv
vgapci0@pci0:2:0:0:	class=0x030000 card=0x02761043 chip=0x94901002 rev=0x00 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. [AMD/ATI]'
    device     = 'RV730 XT [Radeon HD 4670]'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA
